title: Hental
description: An RPG Adventure dedicated to performance and fun. For Forge!
body:
# **Hental**
## The RPG Modpack
### For Forge
Hental Is a modpack focused on Performance and Fun.
Hental has 100+ Mods with more coming soon and will be updated as the mods update, we will also give warnings before removing mods. Hental is intended to be made for fun use and we do not mind using it for other uses.
